action.content: This project will examine the impact of social media on teenage mental health. We will analyze data from [website] to identify patterns and correlations. Our study will compare groups of teenagers who use social media frequently with those who do not. We will also survey [website] to gather additional information. The findings will help us understand the relationship between social media and mental health. This research will provide valuable insights for policymakers and educators. We will use [website] to track changes in mental health over time. Our goal is to develop strategies to mitigate the negative effects of social media. We will also explore ways to promote healthy social media habits among teenagers. This project will contribute to a better understanding of the challenges facing today's youth.
